Button: A button is typically a rectangular area on the screen with text or an icon that can be clicked to perform an action.
Check Box: A square element used to toggle between two states: checked or unchecked.
Checked Radio Button: A circular button that indicates a selected choice, often filled or marked.
Dropdown Box: An interface element typically shown as a horizontal rectangle with a downward arrow, indicating a menu.
Dropdown Expand: The expanded view of a dropdown box, showing all selectable options.
Icon: A small graphic symbol representing an action or object.
Radio Button: A circular UI element used for making a single choice from multiple options.
Scroll Bar: A vertical or horizontal bar used to scroll content, typically located on the edge of a screen or window.
Text Box: A rectangular input field for entering text.
